title: Malaysian Mellow Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic rice bowl dish originating from Malaysia, featuring a balance of mellow and bitter flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add 1 cup of mellow and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add 1 cup of bitter and cook until tender, about 5-6 minutes.
Add 2 cups of malaysian rice to the skillet and stir to combine with mellow and bitter.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add 1 cup of noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the rice mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the rice bowl mixture to a serving dish and garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
